news.title: Wise plans to resubmit national trust bank application under GENIUS Act framework
news.summary: The OCC has granted conditional approval to several stablecoin-focused entities since December.

news.title: Clarity Act on the Ropes as Ethics Fight and Shrinking Calendar Threaten Passage
news.summary: Senate Majority Leader John Thune signals the crypto market-structure bill likely won't clear the chamber before the August recess, as Democrats reject the GOP's ethics language and analysts slash the odds of passage.

news.title: Poolin, Once One of Bitcoin's Biggest Mining Pools, Files for Bankruptcy
news.summary: The Singapore-based pool never recovered from freezing withdrawals in 2022. Now it's auctioning off its last Texas mining sites to pay back 11,700 users still holding IOUs.

news.title: Nvidia, Meta, and Microsoft Tell Washington: Don't Kill Open-Source AI
news.summary: Twenty-five companies signed a letter defending open-weight models days after a Chinese AI helped Hugging Face survive a hack triggered by OpenAI's own systems.

news.title: Strategy Overhauls Bitcoin Metrics, Debuting 'Net Bitcoin Per Share'
news.summary: The firm says its "digital credit" shift needs new yardsticks that strip out debt and preferred claims to show what common shareholders own.

news.title: Bitcoin ETFs Shed $225M, Snapping Seven-Day Inflow Streak as Iran Tensions Spook Markets
news.summary: BlackRock's IBIT led the exit as Bitcoin briefly dipped under $65,000 and stocks fell on renewed US-Iran hostilities—though the week still closed in the green.

news.title: Crypto advocacy groups support CLARITY passage as ethics rules face pushback
news.summary: The window for US lawmakers to address a comprehensive crypto market structure bill before the 2026 elections is closing, and industry organizations are calling for action.

news.title: Internet Freedom Foundation calls India’s BitChat GitHub takedown order ‘unconstitutional’
news.summary: The digital rights group says India’s order to remove Jack Dorsey’s BitChat repositories from GitHub exceeds the government’s legal authority and threatens free speech.

news.title: 特朗普称欧盟“掠夺”美国企业 威胁启动301调查并征收大规模关税
news.summary:
【特朗普称欧盟“掠夺”美国企业 威胁启动301调查并征收大规模关税】金色财经报道，7月25日，美国总统特朗普：欧盟一如既往地直接针对美国企业，这些行动在特朗普政府在任期间不会继续。我们将立即针对“掠夺”美国企业进而损害美国纳税人的行为启动301调查。欧盟的处罚将被完全撤销，我们预计将在最早的时间对欧盟征收大规模关税。

原文链接: https://flash.jin10.com/detail/20260725011333281800

news.title: 伊朗再次警告美军将实施对等报复
news.summary:
【伊朗再次警告美军将实施对等报复】金色财经报道，7月25日，伊朗哈塔姆安比亚中央司令部司令阿卜杜拉希当地时间24日表示，伊朗已将“每有一名伊朗公民死亡，就打击一名美军人员”作为战场行动原则。他称，伊朗此前已向对手证明这一原则具有可执行性，并将从即刻起予以实施。

原文链接: https://www.cls.cn/detail/2436821

news.title: Anthropic宣布推出Opus 5 AI模型
news.summary:
【Anthropic宣布推出Opus 5 AI模型】金色财经报道，7月25日，Anthropic宣布推出Opus 5 AI模型，其性能接近前沿智能水平的 Fable 5，但价格仅为其一半。

原文链接: https://www.cls.cn/detail/2436826

news.title: 成本压力加剧 高通芯片价格将上调两位数百分比
news.summary:
【成本压力加剧 高通芯片价格将上调两位数百分比】金色财经报道，7月25日，高通公司是全球最大的智能手机处理器制造商之一。该公司告知客户，由于成本上涨，将不得不将产品价格上调两位数百分比。据外媒援引一份文件显示，高通于周五向客户发送了一封涨价通知函。高通表示，此次涨价将适用于9月1日之后出货的产品。该公司表示，消化供应商成本上涨的能力已经耗尽，且公司已尝试从新的渠道获取替代性零部件。

原文链接: https://flash.jin10.com/detail/20260725004154903800

news.title: 美英拟就霍尔木兹海峡问题召开会议 推动组建霍尔木兹海峡护航联盟
news.summary:
【美英拟就霍尔木兹海峡问题召开会议 推动组建霍尔木兹海峡护航联盟】金色财经报道，7月25日，据AXIOS网站援引两名欧洲外交官和另外两名知情人士透露，美国和英国计划下周在伦敦召开一次高级别会议，重点讨论建立一个潜在的国际联盟，以保护霍尔木兹海峡的海上航运。报道称，行程安排和日期仍在商讨中，尚未最终确定。美国国防部长赫格塞斯和参谋长联席会议主席丹·凯恩将军可能会出席。消息人士称，美国希望在英国和法国近几个月来与多个国家就霍尔木兹海峡潜在国际联盟进行的讨论基础上，进一步深化合作。许多国家设定的关键条件之一，是海峡内的战斗必须结束，以确保地面条件足够安全，可以开展国际海上任务。消息人士称，美国希望其盟友向该地区派遣排雷船、海军舰艇和无人机等资产，以帮助确保航道安全。

原文链接: https://flash.jin10.com/detail/20260725003110364800

news.title: Do you think that HYPE is a good risk to go short on now that it appears that the IRAN war is about to really ramp up?
news.summary:
I'm not interested in anybody politics. This is strictly an investing question. Right now I'm thinking about taking my $2800 in AAVE & converting it to HYPE based off of what happened to it last time oil prices went high. Thanks in advance.
